# GSAB — Google Sheets as a Backend

> A database-like Python library + CLI for Google Sheets: typed schemas, validation,
> field encryption, async CRUD, and server-side queries. Sign in once with
> `gsab auth login` — no Google Cloud project required.

GSAB treats a Google Spreadsheet like a database: one tab = one table, a `Schema`
gives it typed columns and validation, and an async `SheetManager` gives you CRUD
plus server-side `query()` (Google Visualization query language) and native charts.
Numbers are stored as numbers, so server-side numeric/sort queries work. Python 3.9+.

Install: `pip install gsab` (add `pip install "gsab[pandas]"` for DataFrame support).

## Docs & links

- [Full documentation](https://gsab.ajmalaksar.com/docs): install, auth, schemas, CRUD, querying, encryption, CLI
- [llms-full.txt](https://gsab.ajmalaksar.com/llms-full.txt): the complete docs as one file to paste into an LLM
- [PyPI](https://pypi.org/project/gsab/): releases
- [GitHub](https://github.com/ajmalaksar25/gsab): source and issues
- [Changelog](https://github.com/ajmalaksar25/gsab/blob/master/CHANGELOG.md): version history

## Quickstart

```python
import asyncio
from gsab import SheetConnection, SheetManager, Schema, Field, FieldType

schema = Schema("users", [
    Field("id",    FieldType.INTEGER, required=True, unique=True),
    Field("name",  FieldType.STRING,  required=True, max_length=80),
    Field("plan",  FieldType.STRING,  default="free"),
    Field("price", FieldType.FLOAT),
])

async def main():
    db = SheetManager(SheetConnection(), schema)
    await db.create_sheet("My App DB")                 # creates the spreadsheet
    await db.insert({"id": 1, "name": "Ada", "plan": "pro", "price": 9.5})
    rows = await db.read({"plan": "pro"})              # Python-side filter
    hits = await db.query("SELECT A, D WHERE E > 5")   # server-side query
    print(rows, hits)

asyncio.run(main())
```

Authenticate once from the CLI: `gsab auth login` (browser, minimal `drive.file` scope).

## Core API

- `Schema(name, fields)` — names the tab and declares its `Field`s.
- `Field(name, field_type, required=True, unique=False, default=None, min_length, max_length, pattern, min_value, max_value, validation_rules, encrypted=False)`
- `FieldType` — `STRING, INTEGER, FLOAT, BOOLEAN, DATE, DATETIME, JSON, ENCRYPTED`.
- `SheetConnection(credentials_path=None, *, credentials=None, service_account_file=None, scopes=None, interactive=False)` — `await conn.connect()`.
- `SheetManager(connection, schema, encryption_key=None)`:
  - `await create_sheet(title) -> str` — create the spreadsheet, return its id.
  - `await insert(data) -> None` / `await bulk_insert(records) -> int`
  - `await read(filters=None) -> list[dict]` — filter ops: `$eq $ne $gt $gte $lt $lte $in $nin $contains $regex`.
  - `await update(filters, updates) -> int` / `await delete(filters) -> int`
  - `await query(sql) -> list[dict]` — server-side; columns by letter (`column(name)` maps a field to a letter).
  - `await to_dataframe(filters=None)` / `await from_dataframe(df) -> int` (needs `[pandas]`).
  - `await chart(*, x, y, kind="COLUMN", title="", anchor_col=None) -> int` — native in-sheet chart (`COLUMN/BAR/LINE/AREA/SCATTER/COMBO/STEPPED_AREA/PIE`).
  - `await rename_sheet(new_title)` / `await delete_sheet()`
- `resolve_credentials()`, `login()`, `logout()`, `status()` — auth helpers.

## Errors

Every exception subclasses `GSABError`. Catch `GSABError` for everything, or a specific type:

- `AuthError` — not signed in / token expired or revoked → run `gsab auth login`.
- `ConnectionError` — could not reach Google (network).
- `NotFoundError` — spreadsheet or tab does not exist (check the id / tab name).
- `PermissionDeniedError` — this account may not access the spreadsheet / scope not granted.
- `QuotaExceededError` — rate-limited; back off and retry (GSAB retries 429/5xx automatically).
- `ValidationError` — a record, filter, argument or query was rejected (also a `ValueError`).
- `APIError` — an unexpected Google Sheets API error.

## CLI

```
gsab auth login   [--full] [--client-secrets PATH] [--no-browser]
gsab auth status  [--json]
gsab auth logout
gsab version
```
